exploration_notes: Created torch/optim/_foreach.py with 7 shared foreach utility functions extracted from common patterns across _multi_tensor_* optimizer implementations. Updated 4 optimizer files (sgd.py, adam.py, rmsprop.py, adamax.py) to import and use these shared utilities. AdamW delegates entirely to Adam and required no changes. The shared module covers: empty params check + differentiable assertion, capturable device validation, tensor grouping by device/dtype, step counter increment with CPU optimization
